hero.heading: Apple Hill Tennis Club
hero.subheading: Nestled in the Green Mountains of West Dover, Vermont
hero.description: We are a member-run club of tennis lovers, nestled in the Green Mountains of West Dover, VT. We welcome new members — both local residents and visitors.

welcome.heading: Welcome to Apple Hill
welcome.text: Whether you're a year-round Vermonter or visiting the Mount Snow area for the season, there is always a place for you at Apple Hill in our welcoming community. Come enjoy our beautiful red clay courts surrounded by the stunning Green Mountain landscape.

highlights.title: Two Red Clay Courts
highlights.description: Play on beautifully maintained red clay courts with mountain views.

highlights.title: Memorial Day to October
highlights.description: Our season typically runs from Memorial Day weekend through mid-October, weather permitting.

highlights.title: Community & Friends
highlights.description: A member-run club established 25 years ago as a place to enjoy tennis with friends.

history.heading: Our Story
history.text: Apple Hill Tennis Club was established 25 years ago as a place to enjoy tennis with friends. That founding principle continues to define our community today. What began as a small group of tennis enthusiasts has grown into a vibrant club that welcomes players of all levels.

facilities.heading: Our Facilities
facilities.text: The club features two beautifully maintained red clay courts and a small clubhouse perfect for socializing before and after play. Nestled off Upper Handle Road and Apple Hill Lane near Mount Snow, our courts offer a serene setting surrounded by the beauty of the Green Mountains.

season.heading: Playing Season
season.text: Our season typically opens around Memorial Day weekend and runs through mid-October, depending on weather conditions. The Vermont summer provides ideal playing conditions with cool mountain breezes and long, beautiful days on the court.

location.address: Apple Hill Lane, West Dover, VT
location.description: Located off Upper Handle Road and Apple Hill Lane at Mount Snow in West Dover, Vermont.

hero.heading: Join Our Club
hero.description: We welcome new members to join our club! There are a variety of ways to participate in Apple Hill.

contact.heading: Ready to Join?
contact.text: For membership inquiries and payment options, please contact us.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: News, stories, and updates from Apple Hill Tennis Club in southern Vermont.

posts.title: The History of Apple Hill Tennis Club: 25 Years of Southern Vermont Tennis
posts.excerpt: How a small group of tennis lovers in the Green Mountains built one of southern Vermont's most beloved clay court clubs.
posts.author: Apple Hill Tennis Club
posts.content:
For over two decades, Apple Hill Tennis Club has been a cornerstone of the southern Vermont tennis community. Tucked away off Apple Hill Lane in West Dover — just minutes from Mount Snow — our club has quietly grown into one of the most cherished places to play tennis in the Green Mountains.

## How It All Began

Apple Hill Tennis Club was founded approximately 25 years ago by a small group of tennis enthusiasts who shared a simple vision: a place to enjoy the sport they loved, surrounded by friends and the beauty of the Vermont landscape. What started as an informal gathering of players on a private court evolved into a proper member-run club with two beautifully maintained red clay courts.

In those early days, the founders chose red clay as the playing surface — a decision that set Apple Hill apart from many other courts in the region. Clay courts are gentler on the body, encourage longer rallies, and reward strategic play. For the tennis community in southern Vermont, Apple Hill became the go-to destination for clay court tennis.

## A Community Tennis Club in the Green Mountains

Unlike large commercial tennis facilities, Apple Hill has always been member-run. There are no paid staff or elaborate facilities — just two excellent courts, a small clubhouse for socializing, and a community of people who genuinely enjoy each other's company. This grassroots approach is what makes playing tennis at Apple Hill feel different from anywhere else in the Deerfield Valley.

Over the years, the club has attracted a diverse mix of members: year-round Vermonters, seasonal residents with homes near Mount Snow, and visitors who discover the club while vacationing in the West Dover area. Whether you are an experienced player or just picking up a racquet, Apple Hill welcomes you.

## Southern Vermont's Best-Kept Secret

The Mount Snow and West Dover area is known for skiing, hiking, and fall foliage — but tennis has a long tradition here too. Apple Hill Tennis Club has been a key part of the southern Vermont tennis scene, offering a seasonal playing experience that runs from Memorial Day weekend through mid-October.

The setting is hard to beat. Surrounded by the rolling peaks of the Green Mountains, players enjoy cool mountain breezes, stunning views, and the satisfying feel of red clay underfoot. It is tennis the way it was meant to be played — outdoors, in nature, with good company.

## Looking Ahead

As we look to the future, Apple Hill Tennis Club remains committed to the values that have sustained us for a quarter century: community, accessibility, and a love of the game. We continue to welcome new members — whether you are a local resident, a Mount Snow regular, or simply someone who wants to experience southern Vermont tennis at its finest.

If you have never visited Apple Hill, we invite you to come see what makes this place so special. Our courts are waiting, and there is always room for one more.

---

*Interested in joining? Visit our [membership page](/membership) or contact us to learn more about playing tennis in West Dover, Vermont.*

footer.tagline: A member-run club of tennis lovers in the Green Mountains.
